p1.name: UltAi
p1.purpose: Intake, workflow orchestration, lead management, routing and task management
p1.notes: ClerkOS engine provides case lifecycle state machine. Manus export is the canonical source. Needs migration to packages/core-workflow.

p1.name: FineGuard
p1.purpose: Companies House monitoring, alerts, risk scoring and compliance management
p1.successMetric: Companies monitored, alerts delivered, paying customers
p1.notes: Companies House API service exists and is integrated. Landing page and bundle checkout exist. Alert generation and email delivery status unverified. Stripe integrated. Full compliance loop needs verification.

p1.name: VaultLine
p1.purpose: Immutable audit trail and event retention
p1.notes: Audit event table is live in schema. Durable Functions orchestrator handles bundle validate → render → merge → finalize pipeline. Azure resource provisioning status must be verified.

p2.name: UltraCore Monorepo
p2.purpose: Shared workflow, auth, database, billing and audit infrastructure
p2.notes: Currently a single-app monolith branded vaultline-brand-suite. Must be refactored into the target monorepo structure with packages/core-workflow, packages/core-auth, packages/core-db, packages/core-audit.

p3.name: Compliance Bundle (Checkout Flow)
p3.notes: Stripe checkout pages exist. Reusable billing components worth extracting to packages/core-billing. Do not expand.
